---
title: "Vanessa Ragan"
subtitle: "Student | Computer Scientist| Applied Mathematician"
image: profile.jpeg
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
---

{{<lipsim 1>}}

## Education

Fullerton College \| Fullerton, CA \| August 2018 - May 2021

California State University, Fullerton \| Fullerton, CA \| May 2021 - present

## Experience

Thai Specialty \| Waitress \| August 2018 - present

Fullerton College \| Computer Science and Applied Mathematics Tutor \| August 2023 - present

DataAnnotation \| AI Trainer and Tester \| August 2018 - present
